description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a modern glass facade and a dark structural frame, rising from a paved urban lot. The building features a regular grid of large, blue-tinted windows on all sides, separated by prominent horizontal and vertical mullions. The roof is flat and equipped with several mechanical units and a small rooftop structure, likely for elevator or utility access. The base of the building is set back from a wide, multi-lane road with streetlights and sidewalks, suggesting a city center location. The ground level appears to have a recessed entryway, though specific door details are not visible. The overall design is sleek and functional, emphasizing transparency and structural rhythm typical of contemporary office architecture.
description: A tall, modern office building with a blue glass facade, dark grid framing, and a flat roof, set beside a wide urban street with sidewalks and streetlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the building's narrow profile, blue glass windows, and adjacent street with streetlights.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the wide face of the building, regular window grid, and the main sidewalk and road in front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the building's narrow side and the street running alongside.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back facade with the same window pattern and a continuation of the road behind the building.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform, floor-to-ceiling rectangular windows arranged in a regular horizontal and vertical grid on all facades.
